benefits.description: Very strong appetite suppression; had to drop to 0.125mg due to inability to eat for 3 days on 0.25mg. Accidentally took 0.50mg and anticipates no eating for several days.

side_effects.description: Could not eat for 3 days on 0.25mg; at 0.50mg expects similar or worse outcome

protocol_notes: Considers themselves a hyperresponder. Advocates starting at lowest effective dose (0.25mg) and titrating slowly. Accidental dose of 0.50mg occurred.
